alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with demonstrated operations and transformation leadership, including scaling global commercial operations and program execution
alignments.job_requirement: 7+ years in operations with safety criticality

alignments.candidate_evidence: Documented experience scaling global commercial operations and leading transformation programs, indicating capability to design and implement operational frameworks
alignments.job_requirement: Build systems, frameworks, and standardized processes from scratch

alignments.candidate_evidence: Professional/fluent English speaker with strategy and operations background requiring cross-functional stakeholder management; eight years at structured organization implies documented communication capability
alignments.job_requirement: Exceptional communication and ability to distill complex data into clear, actionable documentation

alignments.candidate_evidence: Experience with transformation programs and commercial operations scaling; no explicit manual-writing or playbook authorship evidence provided
alignments.job_requirement: Author and publish local market playbooks covering operations and safety-specific protocols

alignments.candidate_evidence: Program leadership and transformation execution experience; safety-criticality focus in autonomous vehicles is a new domain not evidenced in profile
alignments.job_requirement: Coordinate safety assurance programs: line-checks, readiness verifications, retrospectives, business continuity planning

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaling and program leadership experience implies people engagement; no explicit evidence of formal training program design or drill execution
alignments.job_requirement: People readiness: ensure staff training, proficiency, drills, and continuous feedback

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience in safety-critical or highly regulated industries (aviation, nuclear, oil & gas, transportation)
gaps.mitigation: Autonomous-vehicle safety requires domain onboarding; candidate's framework-building and program leadership can be adapted, but hire should include mentorship and structured regulatory knowledge transfer from Waymo's safety leadership

gaps.gap: No explicit evidence of operations manual development or technical documentation authorship
gaps.mitigation: Manual-writing and playbook-publication are learnable; hire should pair with subject-matter experts and provide templates or style guides; first 60–90 days should focus on observing and authoring sample playbooks

gaps.gap: Limited direct road-safety, transportation design, or autonomous-vehicle operational experience
gaps.mitigation: Domain knowledge can be built through structured onboarding, cross-team collaboration, and immersion in Waymo's safety assurance programs; experience scaling complex operations is a transferable foundation

gaps.gap: No explicit evidence of formal safety-assurance program orchestration (line-checks, readiness verifications, retrospectives, business continuity planning)
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's transformation and program-leadership experience suggests capability to learn these frameworks; early collaboration with existing BCP and readiness teams and mentorship from operations safety leadership will be critical

output.level_rationale: 7+ years required operations experience maps to L4 (senior IC / lead level). Reporting to Manager of Operations Safety & Readiness indicates individual-contributor or first-line leadership scope, not manager-of-managers. No company-stage context provided. Salary range (£92–96.5k) aligns with mid-level operational or senior-IC track in tech.
output.summary: Strong tenure and operations-scaling background align well with the 7+ year requirement and program-leadership aspects of this safety-focused operations role. Key gaps: no demonstrated experience in safety-critical domains (aviation, nuclear, transportation), no explicit manual-writing or playbook-authorship track record, and autonomous-vehicle safety is a specialized new domain. Candidate's business-transformation and commercial-ops expertise is transferable; frameworks and process-design capability are evident but not proven in safety-critical or highly regulated contexts. Manageability is moderate—domain and documentation skills could be developed with structured onboarding.
uncertainties: Company size and organizational maturity not stated; unclear whether role sits in established safety infrastructure or greenfield ops market expansion
Candidate profile does not detail specific manual-writing, documentation, or playbook publication experience; inference is from program leadership only
Safety-criticality context of candidate's eight years at Google Devices & Services is not specified; unclear if prior roles involved regulated or safety-focused operations
European market expansion scope and travel requirements not assessed against candidate mobility/visa status or location preferences
Degree requirement stated as 'Bachelor's or equivalent'; candidate credential status not provided in profile
